title: See Our Recent Projects
subtitle: From residential homes to large-scale commercial installations, we've completed over 2,800 projects across Ireland. Here's a glimpse of our recent work.

cards.title: Home Solar Installation
cards.description: A full solar PV system designed to maximise energy generation, lower electricity bills, and increase home value. Professional installation by our certified team.

cards.title: Business Solar Installation
cards.description: A large-scale commercial install delivering optimal energy efficiency, significant cost savings, and demonstrating a commitment to sustainability.

cards.title: Residential Development
cards.description: Full renewable mechanical systems for an entire housing development — heat pumps, underfloor heating, and solar. Every home meets strict building regulations.
